meaning: n.远距离操纵器,遥控操纵装置 遥控机器人
examples: The natural language interface system for controlling space teleoperator in natural language is described.
A teleoperator is a kind of robot which be widely used in space exploration, ocean exploration, working in dangerous environments and so on.
It collects the control signals of the teleoperator in a new way. Because these signals are all digital, it makes the collection more credible and safe.
